titleStmt.title: SII 23.186: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 186. (A.R. No. 186 of 1907.) Uṟaiyūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Pañchavarṇēśvara temple on the north wall of the central shrine Parak: Rājāraja II: year 7 (A.D. 1152)

summary.p: The details of date are given as 7th year, Makara, śu. 14, Monday, Uttiram. Makara, śu. 14 can never combine with Uttiram. The intended date was probably A.D. 1152, January 21, f.d.t. ·80, the Nakshatra on this day being Punarvasu. The inscription is damaged with portions lost. It seems to register a grant of land by the assembly of Rājāśraya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam for the expenses of daily worship and of a festival in the month of Vaigāśi in the temple of Tiru-Uḍaitalai-Mahādēva at Tiru-Uṟaiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koparakecarivaṟmara Uṭaiyār śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu śaturdeśiyum tiṅkaḷk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa U
ttirattu nāḷ keraḷāntakavaḷa ṟaiyūrkūṟṟattu rājaāśrayaccarup petimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom tiruuṟaiyūr Uṭaiyār tiruuṭai talaimahātevarkku tiruvaiykācit
tirunāḷukkum nittappaṭikkum ce paḷḷittāmattukkum nammūr periya- kuḷattu Uṭaiyār tirupparāttuṟai Uṭaiyār tevatāṉattu nilat tukku teṟku neṟkuṉṟattu putuveṭṭukā
rāṟṟukku vaṭakku kākkai Āṭic cuṟṟukku talaikku kiḻakku
kārāmpicceṭṭu Ātraiyaṉ Āyaṉ cellanampi Eḻuttu
ttaṉ Eḻuttu kārampicceṭṭu catipāṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
